title: Berry Festival Coming Soon! Vendor & Entertainment Sign ups available!
summary: Save the Date! The Nome Berry Festival will be on Wednesday August 24th at the Nome Recreation Center! The festival is scheduled for 11am-6:30pm. title: Scientific Coordination Subcommittee
summary: Adapting Fisheries Management to a Changing Ecosystem The Scientific Coordination Subcommittee will convene the 7 th national meeting of the Scientific Coordination Subcommittee (SCS7) in person this summer. title: How Is Climate Change Shaping Russia’s Arctic Policy and Activities?
summary: This article analyzes the role of climate change in Russia's Arctic policy towards cooperation, natural resources, shipping and transport. The post How Is Climate Change Shaping Russia’s Arctic Policy and Activities? appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Transition to once-weekly COVID-19 reporting
summary: Effective this week, YKHC will change its daily COVID-19 case statement reporting to once-weekly. Should data indicate a significant increase in cases around the region, YKHC’s Incident Command Team will re-evaluate whether to return to a daily reporting frequency.
